name: app.R
content:
# Infection Simulation Shiny App
# ---------------------------------
# This Shiny app simulates a 24-participant infection/contact-tracing model
# with stochastic transmission, role-based contact, and 3-round structure.

library(shiny)
library(ggplot2)
library(openxlsx)
library(png)
library(grid)

# -----------------------------
# Simulation function
# -----------------------------
run_sim <- function(seed = NULL) {
  if (!is.null(seed)) set.seed(seed)
  
  n <- 24
  groups <- rep(LETTERS[1:4], each = 6)
  ids <- 1:24
  
  # Patient zero
  infected <- rep(FALSE, n)
  patient_zero <- sample(ids, 1)
  infected[patient_zero] <- TRUE
  
  exposure <- rep(0, n)
  history <- data.frame()
  
  base_rate <- runif(1, 0.15, 0.65)
  
  role <- function() sample(c("Standing","Seated"), n, replace = TRUE)
  
  for (round in 1:3) {
    roles <- role()
    
    standers <- which(roles == "Standing")
    seated <- which(roles == "Seated")
    
    # each standing person makes exactly 1 contact
    for (s in standers) {
      target_pool <- setdiff(seated, s)
      if (length(target_pool) == 0) next
      t <- sample(target_pool, 1)
      
      dose <- runif(1, 0.5, 1.5)
      
      mod_s <- ifelse(groups[s] == groups[t], 0.8, 1.2)
      mod_t <- ifelse(groups[s] == groups[t], 0.8, 1.2)
      
      p <- base_rate * dose * mod_s * mod_t
      p <- min(1, p)
      
      # transmission
      if (infected[s] && !infected[t]) {
        if (runif(1) < p) infected[t] <- TRUE
      }
      if (infected[t] && !infected[s]) {
        if (runif(1) < p) infected[s] <- TRUE
      }
      
      history <- rbind(history, data.frame(
        Round = round,
        From = s,
        To = t
        # from_group = groups[s],
        # to_group = groups[t],
        # from_role = roles[s],
        # to_role = roles[t],
        # patient_zero = patient_zero
      ))
    }
    
    # exposure decay
    exposure <- exposure * 0.7
  }
  
  list(
    infected = which(infected),
    patient_zero = patient_zero,
    history = history
  )
}

# -----------------------------
# UI
# -----------------------------
ui <- fluidPage(
  titlePanel("Infection Contact Tracing Simulation"),
  
  sidebarLayout(
    sidebarPanel(
      
      # -------------------------
      # CONTROL PANEL (TOP)
      # -------------------------
      tags$div(
        style = "padding:10px; border:1px solid #ddd; border-radius:8px; margin-bottom:20px;",
        
        actionButton("run", "Run Simulation"),
        div(style = "margin-bottom: 7.5px;"), # Adds 10px space
        numericInput("seed", "Seed (optional)", value = NA),
        # passwordInput("instructor_pw", "Instructor Password"),
        # actionButton("unlock", "Unlock Instructor Mode"),
        # textOutput("auth_status"),
        downloadButton("download", "Download Data"),
        div(style = "margin-top: 15px;"), # Adds 10px space
        downloadButton("downloadPlot", "Download Infection Plot"),
      ),
      
      # -------------------------
      # SUMMARY PANEL (BOTTOM)
      # -------------------------
      tags$div(
        style = "padding:15px; border:2px solid #ddd; border-radius:8px; margin-bottom:25px; background-color:#fafafa;",
        
        h4("Results Summary"),
        uiOutput("summaryUI"),
      ),
      
      # Infection chain panel (NEW)
      tags$div(
        style = "padding:10px; border:2px solid #ddd; border-radius:8px; height:250px; overflow-y:auto;",
        h4("Infection Chain"),
        tableOutput("history")
      ),
      
      width = 3
      
    ),
    
    mainPanel(
      h3("Infection Grid"),
      uiOutput("gridUI"),
      
      # h3("Infection Chain"),
      # div(
      #   style = "height: 250px; width: 250px; overflow-y: auto; border: 1px solid #ddd; padding: 5px;",
      #   tableOutput("history")
      # )
      
      
    )
  )
)

# -----------------------------
# Server
# -----------------------------
server <- function(input, output) {
  
  sim <- reactiveVal(NULL)
  
  observeEvent(input$run, {
    seed <- if (is.na(input$seed)) NULL else input$seed
    sim(run_sim(seed))
  })
  
  output$summaryUI <- renderUI({
    
    req(sim())
    
    infected <- length(sim()$infected)
    
    tagList(
      tags$b(paste("Total Infected:", infected, "/ 24")),
      tags$br(),
      tags$span(paste("Participants:", paste(sim()$infected, collapse = ", ")))
    )
    
  })
  
  output$history <- renderTable({
    req(sim())
    
    head(sim()$history[, 1:3], 50)
  })
  
  output$gridUI <- renderUI({
    
    req(sim())
    
    # FORCE correct node state
    infected_ids <- as.integer(sim()$infected)
    
    tags$div(
      style = "display:grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 150px); gap:6px;",
      
      lapply(1:24, function(i) {
        
        img_src <- if (i %in% infected_ids) {
          "infected.png"
        } else {
          "healthy.png"
        }
        
        tags$div(
          style = "text-align:center;",
          tags$img(src = img_src, width = "140px", height = "115px"),
          tags$div(style = "font-size:12px;", i)
        )
      })
    )
  })
  
  # instructor_access <- reactiveVal(FALSE)
  # 
  # observeEvent(input$unlock, {
  #   
  #   # Set your password here
  #   correct_pw <- "admin123"
  #   
  #   if (input$instructor_pw == correct_pw) {
  #     instructor_access(TRUE)
  #   } else {
  #     instructor_access(FALSE)
  #   }
  # })
  
  # Excel download
  output$download <- downloadHandler(
    filename = function() {
      paste0("simulation_", Sys.Date(), ".xlsx")
    },
    content = function(file) {
      req(sim())
      
      # require openxlsx
      if (!requireNamespace("openxlsx", quietly = TRUE)) {
        stop("Please install the 'openxlsx' package to export Excel files.")
      }
      
      wb <- openxlsx::createWorkbook()
      
      # History sheet
      openxlsx::addWorksheet(wb, "Contacts")
      openxlsx::writeData(wb, "Contacts", sim()$history)
      
      openxlsx::saveWorkbook(wb, file, overwrite = TRUE)
      
      # Summary sheet
      summary_df <- data.frame(
        TotalInfected = length(sim()$infected),
        InfectedIDs = paste(sim()$infected, collapse = ", ")
      )
      openxlsx::addWorksheet(wb, "Summary")
      openxlsx::writeData(wb, "Summary", summary_df)
      
      
    }
  )
  
  
  output$downloadPlot <- downloadHandler(
    
    filename = function() {
      paste0("infection_grid_", Sys.Date(), ".png")
    },
    
    content = function(file) {
      
      sim_data <- sim()
      infected_ids <- as.integer(sim_data$infected)
      
      library(png)
      library(grid)
      
      infected_img <- readPNG("www/infected.png")
      healthy_img  <- readPNG("www/healthy.png")
      
      # ----------------------------
      # ADD PADDING VIA CANVAS SIZE
      # ----------------------------
      png(file, width = 1000, height = 700)  # increased canvas size
      grid.newpage()
      
      n_cols <- 6
      n_rows <- 4
      
      # INNER GRID AREA (leave margin space)
      x_offset <- 0.06
      y_offset <- 0.06
      grid_width <- 0.88
      grid_height <- 0.88
      
      for (i in 1:24) {
        
        col <- ((i - 1) %% n_cols)
        row <- ((i - 1) %/% n_cols)
        
        x <- x_offset + (col + 0.5) * (grid_width / n_cols)
        y <- 1 - y_offset - (row + 0.5) * (grid_height / n_rows)
        
        img <- if (i %in% infected_ids) infected_img else healthy_img
        
        vp <- grid::viewport(
          x = x,
          y = y,
          width = grid_width / n_cols,
          height = grid_height / n_rows
        )
        
        grid::pushViewport(vp)
        
        grid::grid.raster(
          img,
          y = unit(0.65, "npc"),
          height = unit(0.7, "npc"),
          width = unit(0.85, "npc")
        )
        
        strong(grid::grid.text(
          label = i,
          y = unit(0.18, "npc"),
          gp = grid::gpar(fontsize = 13)
        ))
        
        grid::popViewport()
      }
      
      dev.off()
    }
  )
}

# -----------------------------
# Run app
# -----------------------------
shinyApp(ui, server)

name: InfectionTransmissionSim.Rproj
content:
Version: 1.0

RestoreWorkspace: Default
SaveWorkspace: Default
AlwaysSaveHistory: Default

RnwWeave: Sweave
